mapper.sql: id, biz_id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, bind_ds_id, target_info, appro_type, appro_biz, appro_identity, appro_template_name, appro_template_identity, appro_comment, description, status_message, ticket_title, ticket_status, finish_time, deleted, error_count, primary_uid, env_name, approval_url, session_id, explain_sql_data, risk_sql_count, raw_sql, total_count, expected_affected_rows, expected_exec_time, roll_back_sql, ticket_info, levels, checked_info
mapper.update: update dm_approval set ticket_status = #{ticketStatus}, status_message = #{statusMessage}, gmt_modified = now() ,finish_time = now() where id = #{ticketId}
update dm_approval set gmt_modified = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from dm_approval
biz_id = #{bizId} and deleted = false

select
from dm_approval
id = #{id} and deleted = false

select a.id, a.biz_id, a.gmt_create, a.gmt_modified, a.owner_uid, a.bind_ds_id, a.target_info, a.appro_type, a.appro_biz, a.appro_identity, a.appro_template_name, a.appro_template_identity, a.appro_comment, a.description, a.status_message, a.ticket_title, a.ticket_status, a.finish_time, a.deleted, a.error_count, a.primary_uid, a.env_name, a.approval_url, a.session_id, a.explain_sql_data, a.risk_sql_count, a.raw_sql, a.total_count, a.expected_affected_rows, a.expected_exec_time, a.roll_back_sql, a.ticket_info, a.levels, a.checked_info from dm_approval a left join dm_approval_person b on a.biz_id = b.ticket_bz_id
AND a.owner_uid in #{item} AND a.gmt_create > #{ticketQuery.startTime} AND a.gmt_create < #{ticketQuery.endTime} AND a.id = #{ticketQuery.ticketId} AND a.biz_id = #{ticketQuery.ticketBizId} AND a.ticket_title LIKE concat('%',#{ticketQuery.ticketTitleName},'%') AND a.ticket_status =#{ticketQuery.ticketStatus,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.dal.enumeration.RdpTicketStatus} AND b.person_uid = #{ticketQuery.approvalPersonUid} and a.deleted = false and a.ticket_status in ('WAIT_CONFIRM','WAIT_APPROVAL','WAIT_EXEC')
group by a.id order by a.gmt_create desc

select
from dm_approval where id = #{ticketId} for update
select id from dm_approval where ticket_status in('PRE_INIT','WAIT_APPROVAL','WAIT_CONFIRM','WAIT_EXEC','RUNNING','EXEC_FAIL') and #{time} >= gmt_modified order by gmt_modified asc limit 20
